game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: An endless running game where players control a character running on three parallel train tracks, swiping left or right to change lanes, up to jump over obstacles, and down to slide under barriers. The game continuously scrolls forward at increasing speeds, spawning trains, barriers, and collectible coins at predetermined intervals that become more frequent and challenging over time.
game_info.description: Run endlessly through a futuristic train station! Switch between three parallel tracks to dodge oncoming trains, jump over barriers, and slide under obstacles. Collect golden coins to increase your score while the game speeds up progressively. Survive as long as possible to achieve the highest score!
game_info.controls:
A / Left Arrow: Move to the left track
D / Right Arrow: Move to the right track
W / Up Arrow: Jump over obstacles
S / Down Arrow: Slide under barriers
ENTER: Start the game
ESC: Pause the game
R: Restart after game over
